fab_section_md:
- The Lady Meredith was a Hightower ship that limped back into Oldtown in 59 AC after almost three years at sea (fab-the-long-reign-13:17)
- A leviathan cracked her hull, forcing Eustace to make for Sothoryos (fab-the-long-reign-13:61)
identity_line: Lady Meredith — The Lady Meredith was a Hightower ship that limped back into Oldtown in 59 AC after almost three years at sea.

fab_section_md:
- The Autumn Moon was a Hightower ship captained by Eustace's brother (fab-the-long-reign-13:27)
- She foundered in a great storm with all her men lost (fab-the-long-reign-13:43)
identity_line: Autumn Moon — The Autumn Moon was a Hightower ship captained by Eustace's brother.
